title: Emergency Takedown Decision
description: Schema for an emergency takedown decision.

decision_id.description: Unique identifier for the takedown decision.

authorizer_id.description: Identifier of the individual who authorized the takedown.

justification.description: The justification for the emergency takedown.

package_digest.description: The SHA-256 digest of the affected package.

target_reference.description: A reference to the target if a package digest is not applicable.
